overall.description: First-person perspective of walking along a dirt path through rural countryside at night, illuminated by a warm flashlight or headlamp. Tall grass lines the left side while open fields extend to the right, with a dark tree line silhouetted against the night sky in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path through agricultural fields at night

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path, illuminating the ground ahead with a handheld light source

entered.detail: unpaved trail composed of compacted earth and small stones, illuminated by warm artificial light
dense tall grass or crops lining the left side of the path, appearing golden-brown in the light
open grassy area extending into darkness on the right side of the path
dark silhouette of trees or a small forest visible on the horizon against the night sky
single wooden fence post emerging from the tall grass on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt path through open countryside at night. A warm flashlight beam illuminates the trail ahead, revealing tall grass on the left and open fields on the right, while a dark cluster of trees looms in the distant left horizon against the black night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady forward progression along a rural dirt path under the cover of a deep night. It begins with a warm flashlight beam cutting through the darkness to reveal the narrow trail ahead. As the camera advances, the light catches the texture of tall grass lining the left side and the expanse of open fields stretching to the right. The scene then shifts focus toward the horizon, where a dark cluster of trees looms against the black night sky before the path continues its solitary journey into the void.
